echo '=== N8N EXECUTION LOG (last 3 executions of dJHNXJ2pLxKk97Li) ==='
python3 -c "
import sqlite3, json
conn = sqlite3.connect('/home/jose/.n8n/database.sqlite')
cur = conn.cursor()
cur.execute('''
    SELECT e.id, e.startedAt, e.status, d.data
    FROM execution_entity e
    LEFT JOIN execution_data d ON d.executionId = e.id
    WHERE e.workflowId = 'dJHNXJ2pLxKk97Li'
    ORDER BY e.startedAt DESC LIMIT 3
''')
for row in cur.fetchall():
    eid, started, status, data_json = row
    print(f'exec_id={eid} started={started} status={status}')
    try:
        d = json.loads(data_json)
        # Find SSH node output
        result_data = d.get('resultData', {})
        run_data = result_data.get('runData', {})
        for node_name, node_runs in run_data.items():
            if node_runs:
                last = node_runs[-1]
                out = last.get('data', {}).get('main', [[]])[0]
                if out:
                    item = out[0].get('json', {})
                    print(f'  [{node_name}]: {str(item)[:200]}')
    except Exception as ex:
        print(f'  parse error: {ex}')
conn.close()
"

echo '=== DIRECT TEST: moreno-delegate on vm-memory via SSH key ==='
KEY='/home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge'
PAYLOAD=$(python3 -c "
import json, base64
p = {'action':'submit_delegation','instruction':'Say PIPELINE_OK','priority':'low','origin':'direct-ssh-test','requested_by':'jose','rollback_required':False,'governed_execution':True}
print(base64.b64encode(json.dumps(p).encode()).decode())
")
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 -i $KEY jose@192.168.0.205     "/home/jose/.local/bin/moreno-delegate n8n --payload-b64 '$PAYLOAD'" 2>&1

echo DONE_1910
